message.content: {"items":[{"title":"General Public’s Trust in Politics in Germany, 2019","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13519","justification":"This GESIS dataset explicitly matches the requested title, focusing on general public trust in politics. The landing page is hosted by GESIS and the DOI resolves to their archive entry."},{"title":"General Public’s Trust in Politics in Germany, 2015","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12633","justification":"Also titled around general public’s trust in politics, this earlier wave from 2015 is part of the same thematic series archived by GESIS and is likely related to the study the query refers to."},{"title":"General Public’s Trust in Politics in Germany, 2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13241","justification":"Another wave in the GESIS series on general public’s trust in politics, closely aligned with the requested title and subject matter."},{"title":"Allbus/GGSS 2014 – General Social Survey of the Social Sciences (including political trust items)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12127","justification":"While not titled exactly the same, this GESIS study includes items on political trust and is thematically related to general public trust in politics."},{"title":"Allbus/GGSS 2012 – General Social Survey of the Social Sciences (including political trust items)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11615","justification":"Contains measures of political trust within the German population and is archived by GESIS; thematically related to general public trust in politics."},{"title":"European Social Survey (ESS) Round 4 (2008) – European Attitudes to Politics and Institutions","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10988","justification":"ESS rounds stored at GESIS include measures of trust in political institutions; this wave is an example hosted by GESIS that relates to public trust in politics."},{"title":"European Social Survey (ESS) Round 6 (2012) – European Attitudes to Politics and Institutions","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11952","justification":"Another ESS wave with political trust measures, archived and documented by GESIS and therefore relevant to general public trust in politics."},{"title":"International Social Survey Programme: Role of Government V – ISSP 2006","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4502","justification":"ISSP Role of Government modules contain indicators of trust in political institutions; this study is hosted by GESIS and relevant to the topic."},{"title":"International Social Survey Programme: Role of Government IV – ISSP 1996","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4501","justification":"Earlier ISSP module on the role of government, including items on political trust; the dataset is archived by GESIS."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) – Campaign Panel 2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13149","justification":"GLES datasets often include measures of political trust among the German electorate; this GESIS-hosted panel is related to general public trust in politics."}]}
